positive: A dramatic, gothic oil painting style portrait of a celestial owl perched on a crumbling gargoyle. Deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst), occult symbolism, baroque detailing, highly detailed feathers, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoony, pastel, simple
